description: Last9 GPU Telemetry — full-stack GPU observability in one view: fleet status, DCGM profiling, inference serving (vLLM + NIM), power/energy, and hardware health.

panels.title: SM Active (%)
panels.description: Fraction of time at least one warp is active on an SM. Low SM active + high GR engine active = memory-bound workload.

panels.title: Tensor Core Active (%)
panels.description: Fraction of cycles the tensor core pipe is active. Target >60% for well-optimized LLM inference.

panels.title: DRAM Bandwidth Active (%)
panels.description: Fraction of cycles DRAM is actively transferring data. Near 100% = memory-bandwidth-bound.

panels.title: FP Pipe Utilization (FP16 / FP32 / FP64) (%)
panels.description: Fraction of cycles each floating-point pipe is active. FP16 dominates on inference; FP64 near-zero on T4.

panels.title: NVLink + PCIe Throughput
panels.description: NVLink and PCIe bandwidth from DCGM profiling counters. NVLink is empty on T4/A10G (PCIe-only GPUs).

panels.title: Token Throughput
panels.description: Combined prompt + generation tokens per second.

panels.title: TTFT (p50)
panels.description: Median time-to-first-token. >200ms = noticeably slow. >500ms = poor UX.

panels.title: Queue Depth
panels.description: Requests waiting to be processed. Sustained >5 = scale out needed.

panels.title: GPU KV Cache
panels.description: GPU KV cache utilization. >90% = swapping or rejection imminent.

panels.title: Time to First Token (p50 / p95 / p99)
panels.description: TTFT over time. Crosses 500ms = action required.

panels.title: Token Throughput (Prompt + Generation)
panels.description: Stacked area of prompt and generation tokens/s.

panels.title: NIM Request Rate
panels.description: Inference requests per second over the last 5 minutes.

panels.title: NIM Error Rate
panels.description: Failed inference requests per second. Any sustained errors = investigate.

panels.title: NIM Latency (p50)
panels.description: Median request latency for NIM inference.

panels.title: NIM Queue Depth
panels.description: Requests waiting in the NIM inference queue.

panels.title: NIM Request Latency (p50 / p99)
panels.description: End-to-end NIM inference latency over time.

panels.title: NIM Batch Size (avg)
panels.description: Rolling average batch size. Higher = better GPU utilization for inference.

panels.title: NIM KV-Cache Usage
panels.description: GPU KV-cache utilization for NIM. >90% = requests may be rejected.

panels.title: Energy Consumption Rate (W)
panels.description: Instantaneous power derived from cumulative energy counter. More accurate than NVML power_draw on some GPUs.

panels.title: Temperature per GPU
panels.description: GPU core temperature. Threshold lines at 80C (throttle) and 90C (critical).

panels.title: ECC Errors Over Time
panels.description: Correctable and uncorrectable ECC memory errors. Any uncorrectable spike = immediate action.

panels.title: Throttle Events by Cause
panels.description: Active throttle reasons stacked by cause. Each non-zero series = a GPU running below rated speed.

panels.title: XID Errors
panels.description: NVIDIA XID error events. Any event = check nvidia-smi and kernel logs.

title: GPU Profiling — Demo
